fileName: A newborn baby Sea Otter, Enhydra lutris, Morro Bay.jpg
alt: Very young sea otter pup floating at the surface
caption: A newborn sea otter pup floats because its fur traps so much air.
acquisitionNotes: Core article image curated separately from the otter gallery set.
